assertions.reason: `bash scripts/deploy-testnet.sh --profile default` exited with code 1 while extracting deployer address; local Aptos profile config is missing (`Unable to find config .../.aptos/config.yaml, have you run aptos init?`).
Market registration and unauthorized rejection covered by passing tests `market::test_register_market_success` and `market::test_register_market_unauthorized`.
Deposit flow covered by passing tests `accounts::test_deposit_success` and `accounts::test_deposit_and_withdraw_preserves_fa_balance`.
Asset deposit correctness (including FA balance preservation behavior) covered by passing tests `accounts::test_deposit_success` and `accounts::test_deposit_and_withdraw_preserves_fa_balance`.
Withdraw success and insufficient-balance abort covered by passing tests `accounts::test_withdraw_success` and `accounts::test_withdraw_insufficient_balance`.
GTC limit buy placement covered by passing test `order_placement::test_place_gtc_limit_buy`.
GTC limit sell placement covered by passing test `order_placement::test_place_gtc_limit_sell`.

IOC matching/cancel behavior covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_ioc_partial_fill_cancels_remainder`, `order_placement::test_place_ioc_buy_no_match_cancels`, and `order_placement::test_place_ioc_sell_no_match_cancels`.

FOK full-fill and abort paths covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_fok_full_fill`, `order_placement::test_place_fok_buy_aborts_insufficient_liquidity`, and `order_placement::test_place_fok_sell_aborts_insufficient_liquidity`.

PostOnly cross rejection and passive rest behavior covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_place_post_only_buy_aborts_on_cross`, `order_placement::test_place_post_only_sell_aborts_on_cross`, `order_placement::test_place_post_only_buy_rests`, and `order_placement::test_place_post_only_sell_rests`.
Market buy matching behavior covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_place_market_buy`, `order_placement::test_market_buy_fills`, and `order_placement::test_market_buy_multiple_levels`.
Market sell matching behavior covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_place_market_sell` and `order_placement::test_market_sell_fills`.

Cancel own order, locked-fund release behavior, and unauthorized cancel rejection covered by passing tests `cancel::test_cancel_buy_order`, `cancel::test_cancel_sell_order`, `cancel::test_cancel_after_partial_fill_then_fee_change`, and `cancel::test_cancel_other_users_order`.
Price-time priority covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_multiple_fills_price_priority` and `order_placement::test_time_priority_same_price`.
Full-fill matching covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_full_fill_buy_taker` and `order_placement::test_full_fill_sell_taker`.

Partial-fill paths covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_partial_fill_maker_remains`, `order_placement::test_partial_fill_taker_rests`, and `order_placement::test_ioc_partial_fill_cancels_remainder`.
Settlement amount correctness and balance integrity covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_settlement_quote_amount_calculation` and `edge_case_tests::test_balance_consistency`.

Self-trade prevention covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_self_trade_prevention_buy`, `order_placement::test_self_trade_prevention_sell`, and `order_placement::test_self_trade_skips_own_fills_others`.
Sorted orderbook view behavior covered by passing test `views::test_get_orderbook_sorted`.
User balance view behavior covered by passing test `views::test_get_user_balances`.
User open orders view behavior covered by passing tests `views::test_get_user_orders`, `views::test_get_user_orders_empty`, and `views::test_get_user_orders_filters_by_user`.

Pause controls covered by passing tests `admin::test_pause_market_status`, `admin::test_order_placement_on_paused_market_aborts`, `admin::test_cancellation_on_paused_market_works`, and `admin::test_pause_market_unauthorized`.
Unpause behavior and authorization covered by passing tests `admin::test_unpause_market_status`, `admin::test_pause_unpause_cycle`, and `admin::test_unpause_market_unauthorized`.

Zero-fee defaults, fee config updates, and nonzero fee deduction covered by passing tests `fees::test_fee_config_starts_at_zero`, `fees::test_update_fee_config`, `order_placement::test_trade_with_zero_fees_no_deduction`, and `order_placement::test_trade_with_nonzero_fees_correct_deduction`.

Invalid-input aborts covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_zero_price_aborts`, `order_placement::test_zero_quantity_aborts`, `order_placement::test_nonexistent_market_aborts`, and `accounts::test_deposit_zero_amount`.

Insufficient-balance rejection and state integrity covered by passing tests `order_placement::test_insufficient_balance_buy`, `order_placement::test_insufficient_balance_sell`, and `edge_case_tests::test_balance_consistency`.

Deep book depth and middle-order cancellation behavior covered by passing tests `edge_case_tests::test_deep_book_12_bid_levels`, `edge_case_tests::test_deep_book_12_ask_levels`, `edge_case_tests::test_cancel_middle_ask_orders_preserves_sort`, and `edge_case_tests::test_cancel_multiple_middle_orders_preserves_sort`.

Subaccount creation/delegation/revocation and delegated trading authorization covered by passing tests `subaccounts::test_create_subaccount`, `subaccounts::test_delegate_trading`, `subaccounts::test_revoke_delegation`, and `order_placement::test_delegated_limit_order_authorized`.

frictions.description: `scripts/deploy-testnet.sh` exits immediately at profile extraction when no local Aptos config exists, so the script does not print its own friendly error block.
frictions.resolution: Captured the direct Aptos CLI profile error via `aptos config show-profiles --profile default` and used that as blocker evidence for VAL-CONTRACT-001.

blockers.description: Missing Aptos profile config in repo workspace prevented testnet deploy evidence collection.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried deployment command and ran `aptos config show-profiles --profile default`; CLI returned `Unable to find config /Users/maxmohammadi/cash-orderbook/.aptos/config.yaml, have you run aptos init?`.
